members.name: cloudflareWorkerAdapter
members.content:
```typescript export declare function cloudflareWorkerAdapter(opts?: CloudflareWorkerAdapterOptions): any; ```
Parameter Type Description
opts [CloudflareWorkerAdapterOptions](#cloudflareworkeradapteroptions) _(Optional)_
**Returns:** any

members.name: CloudflareWorkerAdapterOptions
members.content:
```typescript export interface CloudflareWorkerAdapterOptions extends ServerAdapterOptions ``` **Extends:** ServerAdapterOptions
Property Modifiers Type Description
[staticPaths?](#) string\[\] _(Optional)_ Manually add pathnames that should be treated as static paths and not SSR. For example, when these pathnames are requested, their response should come from a static file, rather than a server-side rendered response.
